title: selago neglecta
intro: Selago neglecta, also known as Blue Mountain or Mountain Blue, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Selago neglecta include reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential antioxidant and antiviral properties. Selago neglecta can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
